tests.codewars.linked_lists_append_test.build_four_five_six()[source]

This function builds the following linked list: 4 -> 5 -> 6 -> None

Returns

A linked list with three elements

This function builds the following linked list: 4 -> 5 -> 6 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> None

Returns

A linked list with six elements

tests.codewars.linked_lists_append_test.build_one_two_three_four_five_six()[source]

This function builds the following linked list: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 -> 6 -> None

Returns

A linked list with six elements

Returns

None

Returns

None

None
